name: PassBolt
description: PassBolt — Open-source team password manager with GPG encryption, RBAC, and self-hosted deployment for organization sharing.

seo.title: PassBolt — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: PassBolt: PassBolt — Open-source team password manager with GPG encryption, RBAC, and self-hosted deployment for organization sharing.

when_to_use: Team password sharing with GPG encryption and RBAC
Self-hosted credential manager for compliance-sensitive orgs
Secret rotation tracking for SOC 2 access control evidence
LDAP and SCIM integration for enterprise password governance
Shared vault for API keys across development team members

cons: Mobile/CLI story lags the browser UX
GPG key management trips up non-technical users
review.verdict: The pragmatic open-source team password manager; plan on owning the hosting story.
review.best_for: Security-minded teams wanting self-hosted, GPG-backed password sharing.
review.not_for: Teams that want a polished managed service without ops work.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
